title: Atan2 Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function Atan2(Dx As Double, Dy As Double ) As Double
parameters:
Dx	Numeric expression representing the X coordinate.

Dy	Numeric expression representing the Y coordinate.
description: Returns the angle of the imaginary line connecting points (0,0) and (X, Y) in radians.
see_also:
Atan

Atan2 Example

VB Example:

Dim angle As Double

angle = m_spel.Atan2(-25, 50)

C# Example:

double angle;

angle = m_spel.Atan2(-25, 50);
examples:
Dim angle As Double

angle = m_spel.Atan2(-25, 50)
